message:
fix(abi): complete process_abi.rs syscall migration

Migrate remaining 24 libc::syscall calls to raw syscall wrappers:
- apply_file_actions: close, dup2, openat, close_range, chdir, fchdir, ioctl
- child_spawn_fail: write, exit_group
- posix_spawn_impl: pipe2, clone, close, read, execve, wait4

Remove unused last_host_errno helper and c_long import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
